items.title: As first reported on June 23, “The Kings are expected to waive-and-stretch DeMar DeRozan. DeRozan’s $25.74 million expiring contract is only guaranteed for $10 million, which can be stretched over the next three seasons.”
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt:
As first reported on June 23, “The Kings are expected to waive-and-stretch DeMar DeRozan. DeRozan’s $25.74 million expiring contract is only guaranteed for $10 million, which can be stretched over the next three seasons.”

Today, ESPN says DeRozan will be waived. Stretch decision TBD by August.

items.title: Jayson Tatum and Jaylen Brown led one of the most successful eras in the history of the NBA's most storied franchise.
items.author: Bobby Krivitsky
items.body_excerpt:
Jayson Tatum and Jaylen Brown led one of the most successful eras in the history of the NBA's most storied franchise.

332-167 in the regular season
73 playoff victories
16 series wins
An NBA title

They left you wanting more, but reached Celtics immortality in the process.

items.title: Sixers jersey number notes:
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt:
Sixers jersey number notes:

• VJ Edgecombe’s preferred jersey number is 7, which Kyle Lowry wore last year. Other Sixers wanted it, too. Now it belongs to Jaylen Brown.

• No. 45 was Dean Wade’s dad’s number during his college football career at Kansas State. That’s why Wade is wearing it here.

items.title: Just watched FIBA U17 World Cup.
items.author: Mark Jones
items.body_excerpt:
Just watched FIBA U17 World Cup. 

USA    108
Serbia 81

It wasn’t that close. 

USA won Gold. Again. 8th straight time. Despite the alarmists…Youth hoops is in great hands in the USA.

They dragged Serbia. 107-81. Read that again. 107-81. 

Remember the names Clarence Rosser & J Boumtje Boumtje

items.title: Good use of the MLE for Memphis, like splurging on an overqualified 3rd center given Edey’s health concerns. Can shoot. Just adequate as a rebounder and rim protector. On a good enough deal where you can do what you did with Huff and flip him to a team needing a backup 5 for seco
items.author: Parker Fleming
items.body_excerpt: Good use of the MLE for Memphis, like splurging on an overqualified 3rd center given Edey’s health concerns. Can shoot. Just adequate as a rebounder and rim protector. On a good enough deal where you can do what you did with Huff and flip him to a team needing a backup 5 for seconds down the road

items.body_excerpt:
The Jaylen Brown-Paul George trade has been finalized.

Brown is officially a Sixer. He'll wear 7.

items.title: Miami Heat President Pat Riley: "The announcement of today’s trade for Giannis Antetokounmpo and Bobby Portis Jr. is one of the great trades in Heat history. In my opinion, Giannis is one of the top five players in the league and Bobby is one of the best power forwards."
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: Miami Heat President Pat Riley: "The announcement of today’s trade for Giannis Antetokounmpo and Bobby Portis Jr. is one of the great trades in Heat history. In my opinion, Giannis is one of the top five players in the league and Bobby is one of the best power forwards."
